blocks.body: Future Perfect: Questions and Short Answers — Will + subject + have + V3? for actions that should be complete by a future moment.

{"level":"B1–B2","intro":"In questions with Future Perfect, we put will before the subject: Will + subject + have + V3?","rules":[{"label":"Yes/No question","color":"emerald","text":"Start with Will + subject + have + V3?","example":"Will you have finished by 6 p.m.?"},{"label":"Wh-question","color":"blue","text":"A question word comes before will.","example":"What will she have prepared by the time we arrive?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"In short answers, we use only will or won't.","example":"Yes, I will. / No, they won't."}]}

{"title":"1. Basic patterns","intro":"Look at the main types of questions and short answers.","items":[{"label":"Yes/No","title":"Will + subject + have + V3?","subtitle":"Will they have finished before noon?"},{"label":"Wh-","title":"What / When / Why + will + subject + have + V3?","subtitle":"What will you have completed by Friday?"},{"label":"Short answer","title":"Yes, subject + will. / No, subject + won't.","subtitle":"Yes, she will. / No, they won't."},{"label":"Focus","title":"completed by then","subtitle":"The question is about what will already be ready by a future point."}]}

{"title":"2. When these questions sound natural","sections":[{"label":"Questions about a deadline","color":"emerald","description":"Ask whether an action will be complete by a certain time, date, or deadline.","examples":[{"en":"Will you have finished the report by Friday?","ua":"Will the report be ready by Friday?"},{"en":"Will they have packed by tomorrow morning?","ua":"Will the preparation be ready by morning?"}]},{"label":"Before another future event","color":"blue","description":"These questions help you check the order of future events.","examples":[{"en":"Will she have left before we arrive?","ua":"Will her leaving happen before our arrival?"},{"en":"What will you have prepared by the time the class starts?","ua":"What will already be ready before the other event starts?"}]},{"label":"Questions about result and progress","color":"amber","description":"Wh-questions work well when you want to ask how much or what exactly will already be complete.","examples":[{"en":"How many lessons will you have completed by next month?","ua":"We ask about the amount of finished result."},{"en":"How much money will they have saved by summer?","ua":"We ask about the total by a future limit."}]},{"label":"Short answers","color":"violet","description":"In short answers, do not repeat the whole structure unless you need extra emphasis.","examples":[{"en":"Will he have finished by 6? — Yes, he will.","ua":"A short answer with will."},{"en":"Will they have learned enough by then? — No, they won't.","ua":"A short answer with won't."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Quick question patterns","intro":"Here are the most common models.","rows":[{"en":"Will you have finished by tomorrow evening?","ua":"yes/no question","note":"a question about a deadline"},{"en":"What will she have prepared by then?","ua":"wh-question","note":"a question about a ready result"},{"en":"Will they have left before the meeting starts?","ua":"future order","note":"checking the order of events"},{"en":"Will he have saved enough by summer? — No, he won't.","ua":"short answer","note":"a short answer without repeating the whole form"}],"warning":"In short answers, we usually do not say Yes, I will have unless the sentence continues after it."}

{"title":"4. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Using has instead of have in a question.","wrong":"❌ Will she has finished by noon?","right":"✅ Will she have finished by noon?"},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Adding did to Future Perfect.","wrong":"❌ Did they will have completed the task by Friday?","right":"✅ Will they have completed the task by Friday?"},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Using the wrong short answer.","wrong":"❌ Yes, she will have.","right":"✅ Yes, she will."}]}

{"title":"5. Short summary","items":["Questions in Future Perfect = Will + subject + have + V3?","Put the question word before will: What will you have done?","In short answers, will or won't is enough.","These questions help you check what will already be ready by a future moment or event."]}
